headline: Former Tesla Executive On Course To Make Electric Cars Cheaper
summary: What Happened: JB Straubel, Tesla Inc.’s (NASDAQ: TSLA) former Chief Technology Officer, has found a way to make electric cars cheaper by extracting batteries from old iPhones and other personal electronic items,

summary:
The Last Week In A Nutshell

What Happened: Last week ended positive, with broad gains in all S&P 500 sectors.

headline: Musk Says It Will Be Possible For Owners To Telepathically Summon Their Tesla With Neuralink Implant
summary: If it's raining and you want your car to come to pick you up, Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) lets you do that. Owners can pull out their phones, press a button, and their car can drive itself to the owner's location.

headline: A Look At Berkshire Hathaway's Top 9 Holdings On Warren Buffett's 90th Birthday
summary: Warren Buffett, the “Oracle of Omaha”, turns 90 today. The legendary investor has been one of the most followed figures in the stock market.

headline: New Chinese Tech Regulations Complicates The TikTok Deal
summary: What Happened: Chinese authorities have imposed new regulations on technology exports which could complicate matters for the TikTok deal, WSJ reported on Saturday.
